headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on EPAM Systems, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Mizuho  analyst Sean Kennedy   maintains EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $199 to $200.

headline: Needham Reiterates Buy on EPAM Systems, Maintains $175 Price Target
summary: Needham  analyst Mayank Tandon   reiterates EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Buy and maintains $175 price target.
